nasb.text: They are more desirable than gold, yes, than much fine gold; Sweeter also than honey and the drippings of the honeycomb.

esv.text: More to be desired are they than gold, even much fine gold; sweeter also than honey and drippings of the honeycomb.

cnv.text: 都比金子寶貴，比大量的精金更寶貴； 比蜜甘甜，比蜂房滴下來的蜜更甘甜；

ccb.text: 这些比纯金还宝贵， 比蜂房的蜜更甘甜。

csbs.text: 它们比金子、比大量的纯金更珍贵； 比蜂蜜、比蜂巢下滴的蜜更甘甜。
